summary: While observing the landscape, the protagonist becomes mesmerized by Mars (the red star). He feels an irresistible pull toward it. As he closes his eyes, he is violently transported through space into darkness and cold.

storyboard_markdown:
# Scene Contract: CH002_SC005

## Production Intent
Establish a high-concept transition from a grounded nocturnal landscape to an abstract cosmic void. The sequence must bridge the physical stillness of the protagonist in the rocky gorge with the violent, kinetic energy of sudden space displacement via VFX-heavy motion blur and light streaks.

## Required Cast
- protagonist (transformed Earthman)

## Required Environments
- rocky_gorge_canyon (Arizona Mountain Landscape at Night)
- deep_space_void

## Continuity Constraints
- Visual appearance and brightness/hue of Mars in the sky
- Seamless transition from grounded canyon to abstract space sequence

## Beat List
- BT001: Observation of the landscape and Mars
- BT002: Mesmerized trance and eye closure
- BT003: Violent cosmic displacement
